The final pairings are: - Alice with Izzi - Bob with Karl - Claire with Patrick - Dave with Sam - Eve with Lola So, at the end of the dance, Claire is dancing with Patrick. Now: Alice-Izzi Bob-Karl Claire-Sam Dave-Patrick Eve-Lola Fifth swap (Dave and Claire): Dave takes Sam, Claire takes Patrick.
